This field also enables linkage between pharmacies in the Part D Event File and the CCW Pharmacy 
Characteristics File (2006–2013; note that starting in 2014 the NCPDP_ID is used for linkage). 

This variable is only available 2006–2013. 

SHORT NAME: CCW_PHARM_ID 

LONG NAME: CCW_PHARM_ID 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: PDE and NCDPD dataQ™ (derived) 

VALUES: Null, or a 5-digit numeric value 

COMMENT: Beginning with 2014 data, the NCPDP_ID is used in place of the
